text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The day has finally come for the<n>classic race that
decides the Ruler of<n>the Mile—the NHK Mile Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With over a hundred thousand<n>viewers gathered,
the atmopshere is<n>completely different.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-what's happening?! All the<n>precious Umas
appear so poised to<n>slay on today's racecourse!
What<n>have I done to deserve this<n>experience?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: It's incredible! It's divine! I sodon't belong here!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Nevertheless, inadequate as I may be,<n>the
exhilarating rush from<n>experiencing this firsthand
is—hrgnkh!<n>My heart!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
At this point, I couldn't say one way<n>or another.
Being here surrounded by<n>all these talented
Umas... It's like a<n>dream come true.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Here I am, at last, witnessing the<n>beauty and awe
of the whole scene<n>in such high resolution...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But I want to find it. I have to find it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I have to get to the bottom of what<n>makes
Umamusume so blessed and<n>find exactly where
their sparkle<n>comes from!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Even if it means I must be purified in<n>their divine
aura.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Was somebody watching me just<n>now? I've got
this tickling sense that<n>someone's nearby...
choice_data_list: It doesn't seem like anyone's staring at you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Really? As unbelievable as it may<n>seem, it felt
like... in the midst of my<n>simping, I myself was
being simped...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait! I can't afford to be distracted!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day I must discover the<n>secret to
Umamusume glory.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With a race this big, the competition is<n>bound to be
top-notch. Sensing<n>something from the impressive
lineup<n>of first-rate runners, this all-rounder<n>gears
up to show what she's got.
